# About

This is a test page for exploring and demonstrating trends in CO2 reduction
reaction (CO2RR) experimental data. The current site is intended as a demo for
interactive visualization rather than a finalized public database.

For questions or feedback, please contact:
[fengwang.li@sydney.edu.au](mailto:fengwang.li@sydney.edu.au)

## References

This demo is adapted from the datapage and LEVANTE datapage projects:

- <https://github.com/datapages/datapage>
- <https://github.com/levante-framework/levante-datapage>
